page.title: Talk:Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu

revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:琉球王国のグスク及び関連遺産群, en:Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4037072 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) 地図に記されている緯度・経度が那覇付近のもので、これではこの遺産群の正しい位置を記しているといえないのでは?[[利用者:K-kazumasa|kaz]] 2005年12月7日 (水) 16:16 (UTC) :[http://whc.unesco.org/pg.cfm?CID=31&ID_SITE=972&l=EN ユネスコのHP]基準に全ての世界遺産の地図ができています。[[利用者:たね|たね]] 2005年12月7日 (水) 17:02 (UTC) ::それならそうと分かるように書く必要があるかと思います。ユネスコのWeb Siteに記された緯度経度はどのように定義されているのでしょう。[[利用者:K-kazumasa|kaz]] 2005年12月28日 (水) 16:45 (UTC) :::ウィキペディアは編集が自由ですので、もしよろしければ正しい経緯度に書き直してくださるのであれば、こちらは大いに歓迎します。－{{利用者:Ananda/sig}}　2005年12月31日 (土) 13:25 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1207491901 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|ryukyu=yes}} {{WikiProject World Heritage Sites|importance=Mid}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=high}} }} {{DYK talk|1 February|2010|... that the [[World Heritage Site]] '''[[Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu|Gusuku and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu]]''' represents more than 500 years of Ryukyu history?}} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 5 external links on [[Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=807183828 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20100103112921/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_index.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_index.html *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20081004185539/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_satto.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_satto.html *Added archive https://archive.is/20120525150704/http://shitokai.com/ryukyu.php to http://shitokai.com/ryukyu.php *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20100707035849/http://www.virtualheritage.net/news_blogs/852.htm to http://www.virtualheritage.net/news_blogs/852.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090806020459/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/e_index.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/e_index.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 12:48, 26 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:Location map Ryukyu Islands.png|Location map Ryukyu Islands.png]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files found with "maps-for-free.com"|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 13:04, 23 January 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4037072 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) 地図に記されている緯度・経度が那覇付近のもので、これではこの遺産群の正しい位置を記しているといえないのでは?[[User:K-kazumasa|kaz]] 2005年12月7日 (水) 16:16 (UTC) :[http://whc.unesco.org/pg.cfm?CID=31&ID_SITE=972&l=EN ユネスコのHP]基準に全ての世界遺産の地図ができています。[[User:たね|たね]] 2005年12月7日 (水) 17:02 (UTC) ::それならそうと分かるように書く必要があるかと思います。ユネスコのWeb Siteに記された緯度経度はどのように定義されているのでしょう。[[User:K-kazumasa|kaz]] 2005年12月28日 (水) 16:45 (UTC) :::ウィキペディアは編集が自由ですので、もしよろしければ正しい経緯度に書き直してくださるのであれば、こちらは大いに歓迎します。－{{User:Ananda/sig}}　2005年12月31日 (土) 13:25 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1207491901 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|ryukyu=yes}} {{WikiProject World Heritage Sites|importance=Mid}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=high}} }} {{DYK talk|1 February|2010|... that the [[World Heritage Site]] '''[[Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu|Gusuku and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu]]''' represents more than 500 years of Ryukyu history?}} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 5 external links on [[Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=807183828 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20100103112921/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_index.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_index.html *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20081004185539/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_satto.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_satto.html *Added archive https://archive.is/20120525150704/http://shitokai.com/ryukyu.php to http://shitokai.com/ryukyu.php *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20100707035849/http://www.virtualheritage.net/news_blogs/852.htm to http://www.virtualheritage.net/news_blogs/852.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090806020459/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/e_index.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/e_index.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 12:48, 26 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:Location map Ryukyu Islands.png|Location map Ryukyu Islands.png]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files found with "maps-for-free.com"|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 13:04, 23 January 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>Ira Leviton]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Gusuku_Sites_and_Related_Properties_of_the_Kingdom_of_Ryukyu here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/4037072 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) 地図に記されている緯度・経度が那覇付近のもので、これではこの遺産群の正しい位置を記しているといえないのでは?[[User:K-kazumasa|kaz]] 2005年12月7日 (水) 16:16 (UTC) :[http://whc.unesco.org/pg.cfm?CID=31&ID_SITE=972&l=EN ユネスコのHP]基準に全ての世界遺産の地図ができています。[[User:たね|たね]] 2005年12月7日 (水) 17:02 (UTC) ::それならそうと分かるように書く必要があるかと思います。ユネスコのWeb Siteに記された緯度経度はどのように定義されているのでしょう。[[User:K-kazumasa|kaz]] 2005年12月28日 (水) 16:45 (UTC) :::ウィキペディアは編集が自由ですので、もしよろしければ正しい経緯度に書き直してくださるのであれば、こちらは大いに歓迎します。－{{User:Ananda/sig}}　2005年12月31日 (土) 13:25 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1207491901 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=C|1= {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|ryukyu=yes}} {{WikiProject World Heritage Sites|importance=Mid}} {{WikiProject Architecture|importance=high}} }} {{DYK talk|1 February|2010|... that the [[World Heritage Site]] '''[[Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu|Gusuku and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu]]''' represents more than 500 years of Ryukyu history?}} == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified 5 external links on [[Gusuku Sites and Related Properties of the Kingdom of Ryukyu]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=807183828 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20100103112921/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_index.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_index.html *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20081004185539/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_satto.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/003/e_satto.html *Added archive https://archive.is/20120525150704/http://shitokai.com/ryukyu.php to http://shitokai.com/ryukyu.php *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20100707035849/http://www.virtualheritage.net/news_blogs/852.htm to http://www.virtualheritage.net/news_blogs/852.htm *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20090806020459/http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/e_index.html to http://www.wonder-okinawa.jp/002/e_index.html When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 12:48, 26 October 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == A Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion == The following Wikimedia Commons file used on this page or its Wikidata item has been nominated for deletion: * [[commons:File:Location map Ryukyu Islands.png|Location map Ryukyu Islands.png]] Participate in the deletion discussion at the [[commons:Commons:Deletion requests/Files found with "maps-for-free.com"|nomination page]]. —[[User:Community Tech bot|Community Tech bot]] ([[User talk:Community Tech bot|talk]]) 13:04, 23 January 2023 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 03:42, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
